targets.notes: Target described by Microsoft as a science-based reduction of Scope 1 and 2 GHG emissions from a 2013 base year.
targets.title: Reduce Scope 1 and 2 GHG emissions 75% by 2030 from 2013 base year

targets.boundary: Company-wide operations and value chain emissions
targets.notes: Microsoft aims to be carbon negative by 2030 by reducing emissions and removing more CO2 than it emits across Scopes 1, 2 and 3.
targets.title: Carbon negative across Scopes 1-3 by 2030

targets.boundary: Company-wide historical Scope 1 and 2 emissions since 1975
targets.notes: By 2050 Microsoft plans to remove from the atmosphere all the carbon it has emitted directly and via electricity use since its founding.
targets.title: Remove historical Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 2050
